name: adechen
description: Full-stack design token collection manager inspired by Adech Themes.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.db:setup: npm run prisma:generate --prefix server && npm run prisma:deploy --prefix server
scripts.test:server: npm run test:prepare --prefix server && npm test --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.abracadabra: npm run env:setup && npm run test:server && npm run db:setup && npm run dev
scripts.test: npm run env:setup && npm run test:server
